'''Collar Shear''' is an item that is used to remove accessories.
== Trivia ==
* It was added to the original Doggy Talents.
* The item was removed due to the release of the new GUI and the [[Amnesia Bone]].
* Legacy: <ref><p>https://doggytalents.fandom.com/wiki/List_of_Items_and_Equipment*</ref>

''Crafting recipe''
<img src="https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/doggytalents/images/2/2f/Collar_shears.jpg/revision/latest/scale-to-width-down/325?cb=20150418015312">

''Item in use''<br>

[[File:https://github.com/DashieDev/DoggyTalentsNext/assets/122363761/1ad4960b-0456-4314-a985-1f6517ee4cae|image]]<br>
[[File:https://github.com/DashieDev/DoggyTalentsNext/assets/122363761/aaa3410b-a5d0-42fa-aca9-1053f9de9dcd|image]]<br>

''Screenshot of the old wiki''
